## Checklist

- [ ] I built the project locally and it compiles (`ruby generate_xcodeproj.rb`, then build in Xcode)
- [ ] Tests pass (`swift test` in the package, or the app's test target)
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, signing identities, or my own team/bundle IDs
- [ ] The change keeps the privacy model intact (messages only ride the user's own iCloud)
- [ ] I updated docs/README if behavior changed
